description: You are an exhibit technician at the Museum of Science and Industry in Chicago. Configure GPredict as a public kiosk display for crewed space stations. Create a ground station named 'MSI_Chicago' (41.7906 N, 87.5830 W, 181m altitude). Set up a tracking module named 'Crewed_Missions' using this ground station, featuring the International Space Station (ISS ZARYA, 25544) and the Chinese Space Station (CSS TIANHE, 48274). The module must use a Map-only layout with ground tracks displayed for all satellites for a duration of 2 orbits. Ensure the 'Crewed_Missions' module is the only one open and the application is set to full-screen mode. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
